title: Wandering Bonbon
original_title: さすらいのボンボンキャンディ
overview: Hitoe is 34 years old. Her husband is overseas on a business trip, and she wanders aimlessly around town every day, filling her idle time with alcohol.  Masaru is 48 years old. A train conductor. He gave up on his dream of becoming a driver after failing the national exam three times.  The two meet each other while they have families.

trailers.title: 「さすらいのボンボンキャンディ」予告編
